meta.title: The Triumphal Arch
meta.description: Complete guide to The Triumphal Arch in Chișinău. Learn about this historic monument, its location, visiting information, and travel tips.

intro.title: Discover The Triumphal Arch
intro.description: The Triumphal Arch (Arcul de Triumf) is an iconic monument located in the Great National Assembly Square in Chișinău. Originally built to celebrate the victory in the Russo-Turkish War, it has become a symbol of Moldova's national identity and independence.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: The monument is accessible year-round during daylight hours.
Excellent location for photography and leisure walks.
Provides panoramic views of the Great National Assembly Square.

sections.title: Historical Background
sections.content: The Triumphal Arch in Chișinău was originally built in the 19th century to celebrate the victory of the Russian Empire in the Russo-Turkish War. Over time, the monument underwent modifications and renovations, becoming a symbol of Moldova's resilience and national identity.

sections.title: Architecture & Design
sections.content: The monument features neoclassical architectural elements with elegant columns and bas-reliefs depicting historical scenes. Its imposing design makes it a landmark in Chișinău's urban landscape.

sections.title: Cultural Significance
sections.content: The Triumphal Arch is not just an architectural monument but also a gathering place for public events, parades, and official ceremonies. It holds a central place in the capital's civic life.

sections.title: Location & Surroundings
sections.content: Located in the heart of Chișinău at the Great National Assembly Square, the monument is surrounded by important government buildings including the Presidency and Parliament, forming an integral part of the city's historic center.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.addressValue: Great National Assembly Square, Chișinău, Moldova

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSpring: Spring: Pleasant weather, ideal for photography
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Sunny days, perfect for walks
hours.tip: As an outdoor monument, access is free. Special events may temporarily affect access.

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: The monument is located in the city center, easily accessible on foot.
transport.fromStationDesc: Multiple bus and trolleybus routes stop at the Great National Assembly Square.
transport.fromAirportDesc: Take a taxi or bus from Chișinău International Airport to the center.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Extensive network of buses and trolleybuses with nearby stops.
transport.walkingDesc: Centrally located, accessible on foot from any area in the center.
transport.drivingDesc: Parking in the center is limited and paid. Public transport is recommended.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: A scenic walk through the historic center of Chișinău.
steps: Start at The Triumphal Arch in the Great National Assembly Square
Admire the neoclassical architecture of the monument
Walk towards the nearby government buildings
Visit Ștefan cel Mare Park for a relaxation break
End with a visit to the nearby museums

spots.title: Triumphal Arch Facade
spots.description: Front views of the monument, perfect for architectural overview shots with neoclassical design.

spots.title: Panoramic Angle
spots.description: Wide-angle shots capturing the monument and the surrounding square.

spots.title: Architectural Details
spots.description: Close-ups of the bas-reliefs and columns reveal impressive details.

spots.title: View Towards Government Buildings
spots.description: Photos with the Triumphal Arch in the foreground and official buildings in the background.

hotels.name: Chișinău Center
hotels.desc: The area around the Great National Assembly Square offers quick access to the Triumphal Arch and other important attractions. Ideal for tourists who want to be in the heart of the action.

hotels.name: Botanica District
hotels.desc: Located on the outskirts of the city, this district offers quieter accommodation options at accessible prices.

hotels.name: Buiucani Area
hotels.desc: A picturesque residential area, suitable for an authentic and relaxing experience.

hotels.name: Near Airport
hotels.desc: For travelers with early morning or late flights, this area offers maximum convenience.

reviews.title: Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Visitor feedback can be viewed via Google Maps.
reviews.moreReviews: View more reviews on Google Maps

items.name: Ion P.
items.text: A not-to-be-missed symbol of Chișinău. The architecture is impressive and the location is perfect for photography.

items.name: Maria T.
items.text: I visited this monument during a parade. The atmosphere was fantastic, and the monument looks spectacular.

items.name: Andrei M.
items.text: A place full of history. It's free and accessible anytime. I recommend daytime visiting for ideal lighting for photos.

items.name: Elena C.
items.text: One of the most beautiful monuments in Chișinău. It's a perfect place to understand the history and culture of Moldova.

items.name: Vasile D.
items.text: I was impressed by the architectural details. It's a landmark in Chișinău and an important national symbol.

items.name: Ana S.
items.text: Perfect for a weekend walk. The monument is always well-maintained and offers a perspective on Moldova's history.

officialManagement.title: About The Triumphal Arch
officialManagement.text: The Triumphal Arch is an important historic monument located in the heart of Chișinău, representing a symbol of the national identity of the Republic of Moldova. The monument and the surrounding square area are jointly protected and managed for tourism by the Chișinău City Hall and the Ministry of Culture of Moldova.
